documentContext.problemStatement: Dispatch teams need a faster way to see active rider tasks.
documentContext.whyBuilt: Teams currently rely on manual status checks.

sourceItems.title: Rider Active Task Webhook
sourceItems.description: Provides structured updates about a rider's ongoing task sequence, including deliveries and admin tasks.
sourceItems.businessBenefit: Keeps internal systems in sync without relying on live tracking UI.
sourceItems.userImpact: Operations teams can monitor active tasks programmatically.
sourceItems.limitations: Completed and terminal tasks are excluded.

newsletter.title: Stay ahead of rider work in real time
newsletter.intro: Your systems can now follow riders' current work as it happens, so dispatch does not need to depend on the live tracking screen.
newsletter.whyBuilt: Manual status chasing slows the team down.

items.name: Real-time active-task updates
items.body: Connect your internal tools to structured updates for in-progress delivery and admin work, while completed tasks stay out of the feed.

meansToYou: Give operations programmatic visibility into current rider work.
